body:
📌 START HERE — Lifechange Crypto

This channel is for traders done with hype. What you get here:

📊 Daily market reads — funding, liquidations, on-chain flows, key BTC/ETH levels, explained simply.
🎓 #CryptoSchool — how to actually read a chart, size a position, and place a stop.
✅ #RealResults — our trades, posted with exchange screenshots. Wins AND losses — we don't delete the red.
🔻 Free #Signal samples — real setups with entry, SL and targets, mapped before the move.

Our edge is honesty: every call has a Signal ID, every result is verifiable, nothing gets erased.

Want the full room — live entries the moment they trigger, with the reasoning behind each one? Start a FREE 30-day VIP trial 👇
👉 t.me/LifeChange_crypto_bot?start=ch_en
